name: diet-app
description: Full-stack PWA fat-loss meal plan tracker (client + server monorepo).

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
